greeting_Diwali_Excited:
```json
[
  "Diwali's here, let the celebrations begin! ✨
May your home sparkle with joy and laughter.
Wishing you a season filled with prosperity and sweet delights! 🥳
Happy Diwali to you and yours!",
  "Boom! 💥 The sound of Diwali joy fills the air!
Get ready for delicious sweets, dazzling lights, and endless fun.
May this festival bring immense happiness and togetherness to your family.
Happy, Happy Diwali! 🪔💖",
  "Hooray! Diwali's vibrant energy is buzzing all around! 🤩
May this festival usher in new beginnings and abundant blessings for you.
Let your spirit shine as bright as the diyas!
Wishing you a truly sparkling and joyous Diwali! 🎉"
]
```

greeting_Vasant Panchami_Happy:
```json
[
  "May the blessings of Maa Saraswati illuminate your path this Vasant Panchami! 🌼\nWishing you a season filled with wisdom, joy, and new beginnings.\nMay your life be as vibrant as the mustard fields! 🙏✨",
  "Happy Vasant Panchami! Let's welcome spring with open hearts and a burst of color. 💛\nMay your mind be enlightened with knowledge and your spirit filled with creativity.\nWishing you prosperity and happiness today and always! Saraswati Vandana! 📖🎶",
  "On this auspicious day of Vasant Panchami, may divine knowledge bless your life. 🌻\nMay Maa Saraswati bestow upon you wisdom, music, and art.\nWishing you a very joyful and blessed festival! Embrace the beauty of spring! 🕊️🎨"
]
```

greeting_Holi_Happy:
```json
[
  "May your life be painted with the brightest hues of joy and laughter this Holi! 🎨
Wishing you and your loved ones a day filled with sweet moments and colorful memories.
May the spirit of Holi bring prosperity and happiness to your doorstep.
Happy Holi! ✨🌈",
  "Sending you warm wishes and a splash of vibrant colors this Holi! 💖
May your day be as bright and cheerful as the most beautiful gulal, shared with friends and family.
Let's forget all worries and immerse ourselves in the festive spirit of love and togetherness.
Happy Holi! 🎉🥳",
  "May the divine colors of Holi fill your heart with peace, love, and new beginnings. 🙏
Wishing you a festival that washes away negativity and brings forth a year of positivity and success.
Celebrate with delicious gujiyas, vibrant colors, and cherished moments.
Happy Holi to you and your family! 🌸🍬"
]
```

]
